retrieved_result: Will my NETGEAR router work with Verizon FiOS? \"Your NETGEAR router will not replace your existing Fi OS router/gateway device. However, it will be able to work in conjunction with the Fi OS device in one of two ways. Option 1: The Fi OS device can provide router functions while the NETGEAR router works as AP mode only to provide wireless access
Decision_Reason: The result discusses router hardware compatibility, not IDEs or software development tools. Not relevant to 'top IDEs for software development'.
combined_text_for_llm: Will my NETGEAR router work with Verizon FiOS? "Your NETGEAR router will not replace your existing Fi OS router/gateway device. However, it will be able to work in conjunction with the Fi OS device in one of two ways. Option 1: The Fi OS device can provide router functions while the NETGEAR router works as AP mode only to provide wireless access

history.title: Will my NETGEAR router work with Verizon FiOS?
history.description: "Your NETGEAR router will not replace your existing Fi OS router/gateway device. However, it will be able to work in conjunction with the Fi OS device in one of two ways. Option 1: The Fi OS device can provide router functions while the NETGEAR router works as AP mode only to provide wireless access
